summary: PR #22 is a pure rebrand: URL constants updated in DirectConfig.swift (facebookURL/crowdinURL removed, sponsorURL added, githubURL repointed), label copy updated in AboutView.swift, new localisation strings added, and docs updated. All new user-facing actions are passive Link taps that open external URLs. These require no agent tool equivalent — an agent can invoke any URL directly. No stateful actions, no Redux dispatches, no GRDB writes, and no middleware changes are introduced.

capability_map.agent_tool: N/A — external URL open, no app state
